name: Tidal
code: (x,y,n,s)=>{ const u=x/(n-1), v=y/(n-1); const f=(Math.sin(u*Math.PI*2 - v*1.5)+1)/2; return Math.max(0,Math.min(s,Math.round(f*s))); }

name: Ripple
code: (x,y,n,s)=>{ const cx=(n-1)/2, cy=(n-1)/2; const r=Math.hypot(x-cx,y-cy); const f=(Math.sin(r*1.6)+1)/2; return Math.max(0,Math.min(s,Math.round(f*s))); }

name: Moire
code: (x,y,n,s)=>{ const a=Math.sin(x*0.85), b=Math.sin(y*0.85); const f=(a*b+1)/2; return Math.max(0,Math.min(s,Math.round(f*s))); }

name: Swell
code: (x,y,n,s)=>{ const d=(x+y)/(2*(n-1)); const f=(Math.sin(d*Math.PI*3)+1)/2; return Math.max(0,Math.min(s,Math.round(f*s))); }

name: Interfere
code: (x,y,n,s)=>{ const r1=Math.hypot(x-2,y-2), r2=Math.hypot(x-(n-3),y-(n-3)); const f=(Math.sin(r1*1.4)+Math.sin(r2*1.4))/4+0.5; return Math.max(0,Math.min(s,Math.round(f*s))); }

name: Undertow
code: (x,y,n,s)=>{ const u=x/(n-1), v=y/(n-1); const f=(Math.sin(v*Math.PI*3 + Math.sin(u*Math.PI*2))+1)/2; return Math.max(0,Math.min(s,Math.round(f*s))); }

name: Pond Drop
code: (x,y,n,s)=>{ const cx=(n-1)/2, cy=(n-1)/2; const r=Math.hypot(x-cx,y-cy); const env=Math.exp(-r/(n*0.5)); const f=(Math.sin(r*2.0)*env+1)/2; return Math.max(0,Math.min(s,Math.round(f*s))); }

name: Cross Swell
code: (x,y,n,s)=>{ const u=x/(n-1), v=y/(n-1); const f=((Math.sin(u*Math.PI*3)+Math.sin(v*Math.PI*3))/2+1)/2; return Math.max(0,Math.min(s,Math.round(f*s))); }

name: Corner Wake
code: (x,y,n,s)=>{ const r=Math.hypot(x,y); const f=(Math.sin(r*1.5)+1)/2; return Math.max(0,Math.min(s,Math.round(f*s))); }

name: Standing
code: (x,y,n,s)=>{ const u=x/(n-1), v=y/(n-1); const f=(Math.sin(u*Math.PI*4)*Math.cos(v*Math.PI*2)+1)/2; return Math.max(0,Math.min(s,Math.round(f*s))); }

name: Twin Source
code: (x,y,n,s)=>{ const cx=(n-1)/2; const r1=Math.hypot(x-cx+3,y-cx), r2=Math.hypot(x-cx-3,y-cx); const f=(Math.sin(r1*1.7)+Math.sin(r2*1.7))/4+0.5; return Math.max(0,Math.min(s,Math.round(f*s))); }

name: Diagonal Drift
code: (x,y,n,s)=>{ const d=(x-y)/(n-1); const f=(Math.sin(d*Math.PI*2.5)+1)/2; return Math.max(0,Math.min(s,Math.round(f*s))); }

name: Whirl
code: (x,y,n,s)=>{ const cx=(n-1)/2, cy=(n-1)/2; const a=Math.atan2(y-cy,x-cx); const r=Math.hypot(x-cx,y-cy); const f=(Math.sin(a*3+r*1.2)+1)/2; return Math.max(0,Math.min(s,Math.round(f*s))); }

name: Ebb Tide
code: (x,y,n,s)=>{ const u=x/(n-1), v=y/(n-1); const env=1-v; const f=((Math.sin(u*Math.PI*4)+1)/2)*env; return Math.max(0,Math.min(s,Math.round(f*s))); }

name: Lagoon
code: (x,y,n,s)=>{ const cx=(n-1)/2, cy=(n-1)/2; const r=Math.hypot(x-cx,y-cy)/cx; const f=(Math.cos(r*Math.PI*2.5)+1)/2; return Math.max(0,Math.min(s,Math.round(f*s))); }

name: Chevron Sea
code: (x,y,n,s)=>{ const cx=(n-1)/2; const d=Math.abs(x-cx)+y; const f=(Math.sin(d*0.9)+1)/2; return Math.max(0,Math.min(s,Math.round(f*s))); }

name: Caustic
code: (x,y,n,s)=>{ const u=x/(n-1), v=y/(n-1); const f=(Math.sin(u*9)*Math.sin(v*9)+Math.sin((u+v)*7))/3+0.5; return Math.max(0,Math.min(s,Math.round(f*s))); }

name: Surge
code: (x,y,n,s)=>{ const u=x/(n-1), v=y/(n-1); const env=Math.exp(-Math.pow((v-0.5)*2.2,2)); const f=((Math.sin(u*Math.PI*5)+1)/2)*env; return Math.max(0,Math.min(s,Math.round(f*s))); }

name: Ripple Fade
code: (x,y,n,s)=>{ const cx=(n-1)/2, cy=(n-1)/2; const r=Math.hypot(x-cx,y-cy); const env=Math.max(0,1-r/(n*0.7)); const f=((Math.sin(r*2.2)+1)/2)*env; return Math.max(0,Math.min(s,Math.round(f*s))); }

name: Beat
code: (x,y,n,s)=>{ const u=x/(n-1); const f=(Math.sin(u*Math.PI*8)*Math.sin(u*Math.PI*1.3 + y/(n-1)*2)+1)/2; return Math.max(0,Math.min(s,Math.round(f*s))); }

name: Maelstrom
code: (x,y,n,s)=>{ const cx=(n-1)/2, cy=(n-1)/2; const a=Math.atan2(y-cy,x-cx); const r=Math.hypot(x-cx,y-cy); const f=(Math.sin(a*2 - r*1.5)+1)/2; return Math.max(0,Math.min(s,Math.round(f*s))); }

name: Deep Current
code: (x,y,n,s)=>{ const u=x/(n-1), v=y/(n-1); const f=(Math.sin((u+0.3*Math.sin(v*Math.PI*2))*Math.PI*4)+1)/2; return Math.max(0,Math.min(s,Math.round(f*s))); }
